CustomField.formula: IF ( AND ( leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__EOLA__c == TRUE, NOT(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__Ext_Reserve_Type__c ,'Monthly MR')) ), 'EOLA', IF( AND ( leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__EOLA__c == TRUE, ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__Ext_Reserve_Type__c ,'Monthly MR') ), 'BOTH', IF( AND( leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__EOLA__c == FALSE, NOT(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__Ext_Reserve_Type__c ,'EOLA') )), 'MR', IF( AND( leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__EOLA__c == FALSE, (ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Fx_General_Input__r.leaseworks__Ext_Reserve_Type__c ,'EOLA') )), 'BOTH',NULL) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Reserve Type
